calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Jun-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Pamela A. Underwood, Esq., appeared for Petitioner and moving party: no other appearances.
Tentative ruling adopted: Petitioner State of California's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motino To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Apr-02-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Pamela A. Underwood, Esq., ASSISTANT DISTRICT ATTORNEY (415/551-9544), appearing for petitioner / moving party.

Ruling:
No other appearances. Tentative Ruling adopted: Petitioner's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories, And Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent Humberto Garcia Bravo is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Dec-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People Of The State Of California's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories, And Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
